name: The Plated Project
item: Art plates, embroidered canvas, gallery wall sets, framed art
why: The most Gen Z Indian wall art brand right now makes your wall feel curated, not cluttered. Every piece is an object, not just a print.

name: Dessine Art
item: Museum prints, hand-painted originals, art plates
why: Surrealist to contemporary prints with a wide range of styles. For someone who wants proper wall art without spending proper wall art money.

name: Ekibeki
why: Quiet, personal prints of Indian cities, monsoons and specific moods. For someone who wants their wall to carry something Indian but illustrated beautifully.

name: Peeekaboo
why: Witty and relatable prints with anime and travel options. For someone who rotates wall art the way others rotate playlists. Ultra affordable.

name: Studio Artemist
why: Accessible canvas and paper prints across a wide range of styles. The accessible entry point wide range, low spend, decent quality.

name: My Retro Poster
why: Hand-painted by real artists (no Al), museum-grade matte art paper, limited editions. The travel poster brand Gen Z actually buys.

name: Desenio
why: Where most Gen Z gallery walls actually came from. If they have a Pinterest board, half of it probably came from here.

name: The Poster Club
item: Curated drops from emerging global artists
why: Copenhagen-based curated drops from emerging global artists. For the person who wants their wall to look considered, not bought.

name: DROOL
why: Backs emerging artists worldwide every print is exclusive to DROOL. For the person who thinks most wall art is boring. DROOL is never boring.

name: Displate
item: Metal posters - anime, gaming, music, bands, travel
why: Magnetic mounting so no holes in your wall. For the person who wants their poster to be a statement AND a conversation starter.

name: Vice Press
why: Officially licensed screen prints for cult films, horror, A24, sci-fi, TV. For the person who follows poster drops the way others follow sneaker drops.

name: Posterlounge
why: Massive European poster platform - Mediterranean, retro travel, photography, vintage film, botanical. The reliable European option. Wide range, consistent quality, affordable pricing.

name: The Revolver Club
why: India's biggest vinyl retailer. The first stop for buying vinyl in India. If the record exists, they likely have it. Also offers a Stereo Box vinyl subscription.

name: Music Circle
why: The most comprehensive Indian vinyl store online with 36,000+ records. Run by Pilak Bhatt. Unbeatable for finding rare Indian music on vinyl.

name: Rough Trade
why: London's iconic independent record store since 1976. The gold standard for indie and alternative vinyl imports with hand-curated staff picks.

name: Bandcamp
why: Buy directly from your favorite artist. The most ethical way to buy music, where artists receive 82-90% of every sale. The most meaningful vinyl buy.

name: Discogs
why: World's largest vinyl marketplace. Best when you know exactly what record they want and need a specific pressing or rare first edition find.

name: Vinyl Me Please
why: A premium monthly subscription sending exclusive limited-edition pressings with custom artwork. The gift that keeps coming.

name: Norman Records
why: Online-only independent record store. Hand-curated, staff-reviewed, no algorithm. Best for giving someone a record they have never heard of.

name: Freestyle Vinyl
why: Upload any songs + custom cover artwork to receive a real playable vinyl record. The most personal gift possible for a music person.

name: Vinylify
why: Custom lathe-cut vinyl with free insured worldwide shipping. Choose disc color and design the sleeve. Clean ordering process.

name: American Vinyl Co
why: The most reviewed custom vinyl service globally. Thousands of verified reviews for anniversary and birthday gifts with reliable turnaround.

name: Print Your Vinyl
why: Custom vinyl with diamond-cut precision and a full 300gsm deluxe jacket. Fastest turnaround (under 12 days) for when the birthday is coming up fast.

name: Crosley
why: The most popular entry-level turntable brand globally. For the person who has been talking about getting a record player for two years.

name: FNP - Ferns N Petals
why: India's largest and most trusted flower delivery platform. The go-to when you know the city, need it today, and want it to actually arrive looking good.

name: Flower Aura
why: India's #1 florist for fresh flower delivery. For someone who wants fresh flowers delivered reliably, anywhere in India, today.

name: IGP
why: Premium gifting platform with a strong floral range. Excellent for combining flowers with other gifts in one order. IGP bundles beautifully and delivers fast.

name: Interflora India
why: India arm of the global Interflora network. For the gift where the flowers arriving need to make someone actually say 'wow'.

name: The Flora
why: Artisanal flower studio delivering premium cut flower arrangements. The kind of bouquet that looks like it came from a boutique florist, not a vendor cart.

name: Fiorella
why: Premium floral boutique. The go-to for someone who wants flowers to look like they came from a Parisian flower shop. Fiorella's packaging does half the work.

name: The Flower Co
why: Known for turning ordinary flowers into art. For the person whose aesthetic means the bouquet needs to look as good as the gift.

name: Bloomsvilla
why: Luxury flower delivery platform specialising in premium rose arrangements. For an anniversary or romantic occasion where flowers need to feel genuinely luxurious.

name: Fleurs D'épargne
why: Indie boutique florist with a curated, aesthetic approach. For someone who takes flowers seriously and wants something that doesn't look like it was ordered off a platform.

name: The Flower People
why: Artisan florist with a strong editorial aesthetic. When the recipient has taste, and a generic bunch would be an insult to both of you.

name: Coastal Habitat
why: India's most aesthetic dried flower brand. The dried flower gift that actually sits on someone's shelf for a year and still gets compliments.

name: The Maeva Store
why: Handcrafted dried flower bouquets, botanical wreaths, and table decor. For someone who would rather have a dried arrangement on their shelf than dead fresh flowers after three days.

name: Foliaro
why: The affordable entry point into dried botanical gifting—quality without the premium price tag. Clean design language and good price range.

name: Leafy Affair
why: Makes jewellery from real preserved flowers, dandelion seeds and ferns. For someone who loves flowers but wants them to last forever. The most unique botanical gift.

name: Jellycat
why: The original Gen Z plush obsession. Each character has a name and a personality. For someone who has sent you a Jellycat meme at least once.

name: Squishmallows
why: 100 million units sold globally. Squishmallows are the most collected plush of the Gen Z era with a marshmallow texture. For the person who cannot walk past a soft thing without picking it up.

name: Pop Mart / Labubu
why: The biggest collectible trend of 2024-25. Mischievous monster plush pendants in blind boxes. For the person who has been seeing Labubu on every Instagram story and finally wants one.

name: Sonny Angel
why: Tiny cherub figurines in blind boxes - the pre-Labubu collector obsession that never went away. For the aesthete who displays things on their shelf with intention.

name: Aurora World / Palm Pals
why: Tiny, palm-sized plushies that fit in your hand. The more affordable Jellycat alternative with a massive, endlessly expandable range. Also the best stocking-stuffer level gift in this category.

name: Bear Hugs India
why: India's #1 novelty and plush store. The one-stop shop for every imported plush brand in India. If you are buying any plush brand for someone in India and do not want to deal with international shipping start here.

name: Hamleys India
why: India's most trusted toy retailer. The safe, reliable choice when you need something you can trust. For a gift that needs zero explanation and zero risk.

name: Miniso India
why: Japan-inspired lifestyle brand with the most affordable Sanrio and character plush in India. For someone who loves Sanrio but does not need to spend Jellycat prices.

name: Toy Collectors India
why: Specialist collector toy store in India. For when the gift is for a serious collector who already knows exactly what they want.

name: Luxe by Kan
why: Premium Labubu and Pop Mart reseller in India. For the collector who needs the rare one. Luxe by Kan is where you go for the editions that already sold out everywhere else.

name: Sanrio Characters
why: The Sanrio universe in plush form. For someone who has a Sanrio character as their phone wallpaper. This is the gift they already want.

name: Stitch / Disney Plush
why: Stitch is the most gifted Disney plush in India right now. Disney plush never goes wrong. Stitch is the answer when you know someone loves Disney but have no idea which character.

name: Pokemon Plush
why: The Pokemon plush range spans every generation and every taste. Match the Pokemon to the person. For someone who grew up playing Pokemon or still does.

name: Gund
why: Premium American plush brand since 1898. The plush brand that feels like a real hug. For someone who does not collect but would treasure one perfect, beautiful soft toy for years.

name: Ty / Beanie Boos
why: The iconic bean-stuffed collectible animals with oversized sparkle eyes. Small, affordable, endlessly collectable. For someone who collected Beanie Babies as a child.

name: Warmies
why: Microwavable, lavender-scented plush animals. You heat them in the microwave and they stay warm for hours. For someone who needs a hug more than a collectible.

name: Bored Game Company
item: Board Game Retailer (Strategy, Party, Family, Co-op)
why: India's biggest board game retailer with 500+ games. The single most trusted source for board games in India. Start here always.

name: Board Games India
why: India's oldest board game retailer, publisher, and distributor. Best for finding niche and Kickstarter games that bigger retailers don't stock.

name: Tabletop Universe
why: Premium board game store with 100% guaranteed traceability to publishers. For the serious gamer who wants premium, authentic titles with no knockoffs.

name: Board Games Bazaar
why: Solid mid-tier Indian board game retailer. Best for buying specific popular titles (like Exploding Kittens and Catan) at fair prices with an Indian warranty.

name: Skillmatics
item: Guess in 10, Found It & 100+ Card Games
why: Screen-free, portable, Gen Z-friendly card games. The Indian brand that makes gifting a card game feel thoughtful, not generic.

name: Exploding Kittens
why: A kitty-powered Russian Roulette game with hilarious chaos. For literally any group of friends. The fastest game night starter ever made.

name: Unstable Unicorns
why: Build a unicorn army and destroy your rivals. For groups who want something more strategic than Exploding Kittens but just as chaotic.

name: Catan
why: The game that got an entire generation into modern board gaming. The universal gateway into hobby gaming and the single best intro to strategy board games.

name: Codenames
why: Two rival spymasters give one-word clues to identify agents. Simple to teach, deeply strategic, and infinitely replayable. The only word game that makes everyone feel clever.

name: Ticket to Ride
why: Collect train cards and claim railway routes across a gorgeous illustrated map. The perfect board game for someone who has never played one before.

name: UNO
item: UNO Special Editions (Flip, All Wild, Attack)
why: Everyone knows UNO, but the special editions are genuinely different games. Gift the Flip or All Wild edition—they will not expect it and they will love it.

name: Hasbro Gaming
why: The original game night brands. For a group that wants zero learning curve. These are the originals for a reason.

name: Wingspan
why: Attract birds to your wildlife reserve in this engine-building masterpiece. Stunning artwork and gorgeous components. For someone who appreciates a beautiful object as much as a good game.

name: What Do You Meme?
item: What Do You Meme? Party Game
why: Create the funniest meme by pairing caption cards with iconic photo cards. The only card game specifically designed for people who communicate in memes.
